full_text:
Xue Zong (Jingwen) 薛綜 (敬文)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Zong (薛綜), styledJingwen (敬文), was born in Pei. Took part in conquering Vietnam, skilled in debate and composition. Xue Zong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Xue Zong lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
